message:
🌱 Add longhorn: [IMPROVEMENT] Expose SPDK UBLK Parameters mission (#1252)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "longhorn-11039-improvement-expose-spdk-ublk-parameters",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "longhorn: [IMPROVEMENT] Expose SPDK UBLK Parameters",
+    "description": "[IMPROVEMENT] Expose SPDK UBLK Parameters. This issue affects 5+ users.",
+    "type": "analyze",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify longhorn analyze symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your longhorn deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n longhorn -l app.kubernetes.io/name=longhorn
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=longhorn -n longhorn --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review longhorn configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant longhorn configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n longhorn -l app.kubernetes.io/name=longhorn
kubectl get configmap -n longhorn -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=longhorn
```
### Is your improvement request related to a feature? Please describe (👍 if you like this request)

The SPDK UBLK frontend includes `queue_depth`, `num_queues`, `disable-user-copy` parameters that impact I/O performance."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [IMPROVEMENT] Expose SPDK UBLK Parameters",
+        "description": "## Pre Ready-For-Testing Checklist

The reproduce steps/test steps are at: https://github.com/longhorn/longhorn/issues/11039#issuecomment-3544740242

The workaround is at:~~

The PR for the YAML change is at: https://github.com/longhorn/longhorn/pull/12218
The PR for the chart change is at:

The PR
```yaml
kind: StorageClass
    apiVersion: storage.k8s.io/v1
    metadata:
      name: longhorn-v2-data-engine
    provisioner: driver.longhorn.io
    allowVolumeExpansion: true
    reclaimPolicy: Delete
    volumeBindingMode: Immediate
    parameters:
      numberOfReplicas: "1"
      staleReplicaTimeout: "2880"
      fsType: "ext4"
      dataEngine: "v2"
      ublkQueueDepth: "256"
      ublkNumberOfQueue: "7"
      frontend: "ublk"
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm [IMPROVEMENT] Expose SPDK UBLK Parameters is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=longhorn -n longhorn --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n longhorn --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## Pre Ready-For-Testing Checklist

The reproduce steps/test steps are at: https://github.com/longhorn/longhorn/issues/11039#issuecomment-3544740242

The workaround is at:~~

The PR for the YAML change is at: https://github.com/longhorn/longhorn/pull/12218
The PR for the chart change is at:

The PR is at
[feat: expose SPDK UBLK Parameters",
